profileSummary:
EXPERT IN UX/UI DESIGN | WEB DEVELOPMENT | AI-DEVELOPMENT AND AUTOMATION | INFRASTRUCTURE LEADER | 20 YRS DATA CENTER & NETWORK OPERATIONS | 110 GLOBAL SITES | FORTUNE 500 EXPERIENCE

Software, Hardware & Web Engineering, UX/UI Design & Development, Systems Engineering, Information Technology Development and Support, Business Operations, Administration and Management, Microsoft Windows, Linux, Mac PCs, POS Hardware, Payments & Checks. 4-Year College Degree – BBA Business Administration.
